pageContext.name: Jack
pageContext.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present The Cult of San Reja series in the Battle for the Stars line of JoyToy collectibles and action figures. Battle for the Stars is a line of 1:18 scale, science fiction-themed action figures, and vehicles. The figures are made with exquisite detail and are highly posable to create a variety of scenes.  The Cult of San Reja introduces new aspects to the Battle for the Stars universe, featuring characters and vehicles reminiscent of chaotic sci-fi and post-apocalyptic fiction and pop culture such as Mad Max, the Chronicles of Riddick, and Borderlands. Each figure comes with a variety of accessories and weapons, perfect for creating any number of scenes where the only limit is your imagination.  Order yours today!
